title: Sales Specialist - Super App!
description:
Are you a natural deal-closer with a passion for food, retail, and digital innovation? Join one of the region’s most iconic tech companies and be at the forefront of transforming how F&B and retail businesses engage millions of consumers.

As a Sales Specialist, you’ll play a mission-critical role in acquiring new merchants, designing high-impact campaigns, and helping partners thrive in the fast-paced world of on-demand commerce. Base and variable commission/bonus will be provided.

Your Day-to-Day Impact

  • Drive merchant acquisition by proactively reaching out through calls, emails, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and other outbound channels.
  • Qualify both inbound and outbound leads using clear criteria such as merchant profile, operational readiness, and interest in reservation or SaaS solutions.
  • Schedule and coordinate meetings for the outbound team, ensuring all briefing sheets are complete, accurate, and rich with relevant insights.
  • Maintain a well-organised and up-to-date pipeline by managing lead records across CRM platforms like Streak and Salesforce.
  • Partner closely with the Sales Team to ensure alignment on lead quality, share feedback, and track meeting outcomes.
  • Monitor and report on daily and weekly outreach performance, including volume, meetings booked, and conversion metrics.
  • Stay sharp by joining regular training sessions and keeping up with exciting product offerings, competitive landscape, and new market developments.

What You Bring to the Team

  • Looking for a big name to kick start your career!
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills, paired with a confident and professional phone presence.
  • Strong attention to detail and a disciplined approach to documentation.
  • Resilience and comfort working in a high-volume outreach environment where rejection is part of the journey.

Why Apply?

  • Work with a high-growth team that moves fast and rewards impact.
  • Shape the success of thousands of businesses across Singapore.
  • Access to cutting-edge marketing and tech solutions.
  • A career-launchpad in one of Asia’s most innovative tech environments.

Ready to start 2026 with a bang?

EA Reg No: R22105268

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA License No. 10C4544

postedCompany.description:
ALLEGIS GROUP SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Allegis Group is the global leader in talent solutions focused on working harder and caring more than any other provider. We’ll go further to understand the needs of our people – our clients, our candidates, and our employees – and to consistently deliver on our promise of an unsurpassed quality experience. That’s the Allegis Group difference, and it’s consistent across every Allegis Group company. With more than US$11billion in annual revenues and over 500 locations across the globe, our network provides businesses with a comprehensive suite of talent solutions — without sacrificing the niche expertise required to ensure a successful partnership. Our specialised group of companies includes: Aerotek, TEKsystems, Allegis Global Solutions, Aston Carter, Major, Lindsey & Africa, Allegis Partners, MarketSource, and EASi. Visit www.AllegisGroup.com to learn more.

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA Licence No. 10C4544
